constraints: right knee osteoarthritis — range-limit leg press to 90°, no high-impact movements
mild hypertension — RPE cap 7, no breath-holding or Valsalva maneuver

machine_settings.Leg Press: Seat 3, Back pad 2 — range-limit to 90° knee flexion
machine_settings.Leg Extension: Seat 3, Lever 4, Ankle pad notch 3 — terminal extension only (30° to full)

notes: 62yo retired teacher. Right knee OA diagnosed 2023, conservative management. On lisinopril for mild hypertension (well-controlled). Trains independently 2–3x/week between sessions on bike and machines. Highly motivated. Keep RPE 5–7 and monitor knee discomfort — pain score should stay at 0 during and after session. Excellent form learner.
